rationale: Section 48.106 governs career and technology education allotments based on student attendance and course weights. It contains no reference to homestead exemptions or Tax Code §11.13(b), so no direct conflict exists.
quote: For each full-time equivalent student in average daily attendance in an approved career and technology education program in grades 7 through 12, a district is entitled to an annual allotment equal to the basic allotment
_note: No textual link between the homestead exemption increase and this CTE allotment provision. Indirect revenue effects on school finance are possible but not a textual conflict.
